title: Water Energy Services Works with J.B. Hunt to Drive Sustainable Solutions in the Energy Sector
text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #ReclaimingEnergy--Water Energy Services (WES), a leading provider of innovative water management solutions company for the energy industry, is thrilled to select J.B. Hunt Transport, Inc. as its strategic transportation provider. This collaboration aims to advance sustainable practices in the energy sector and deliver enhanced value to WES clients by leveraging the complementary expertise and resources of both organizations. title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. Announces Participation in Upcoming Investor Conferences
text: LOWELL, Ark.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBHT) Senior Vice President of Intermodal Stacey Griffin and Senior Vice President of Finance of Contract Services Stephen Guenther will participate in investor meetings at the 2023 Susquehanna Industrials, Energy & Travel Conference on August 8, 2023.
